Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MECHTILD von Habsburg, daughter of RUDOLF I King of Germany Graf von Habsburg & his first wife Gertrud [Anna] von Hohenberg [Zollern] (Rheinfelden [1253]- Munich 22 or 23 Dec 1304, bur Fürstenfeld Cistercian Convent).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg於1253年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 洛拉賀時，她的父親Rudolf I von Habsburg35歲，母親Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg23歲。她於1273年10月24日與Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫斯泰特雷吉 亞琛亞琛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年12月23日在德國貝也明陳享年51歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 費爾斯騰費爾德布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg于1253年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 洛拉賀时，她的父亲Rudolf I von Habsburg35岁，母亲Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg23岁。她于1273年10月24日与Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫斯泰特雷吉 亞琛亞琛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年12月23日在德国貝也明陳享年51岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 費爾斯騰費爾德布盧可。

en.Aachen, Städteregion Aachen, North Rhine: Aachen, Städteregion Aachen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany

nameMeanings.name: Gräfin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an unexplained (placename) element + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Slovenian: probably a topographic name derived from grad ‘castle’, or from archaic gradina ‘site of ancient fort’.
Galician (Gradín): habitational name from a place called Gradín, in Lugo and Pontevedra provinces (in Galicia, Spain), from Latin (villam) Gratini, from the Latin name Gratinus.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg was born in 1253, in Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Rudolf I von Habsburg, was 35 and her mother, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, was 23. She married Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein on 24 October 1273, in Aachen, Städteregion Aachen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 December 1304, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 51, and was buried in Fürstenfeldbruck, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg est née en 1253, à Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Rudolf I von Habsburg, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein le 24 octobre 1273, à Aix-la-Chapelle, Städteregion Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1304, à München, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg 1253 in Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rudolf I von Habsburg 35 und ihre Mutter Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg 23. Sie hat am 24. Oktober 1273 in Aachen, Städteregion Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Dezember 1304 im Alter von 51 Jahren in München, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg è nata il nel 1253 nel Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Rudolf I von Habsburg, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein il 24 ottobre 1273, nel Aachen, Städteregion Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1304, nel München, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburgが1253年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグクレイス ルoラチで生まれた時，父Rudolf I von Habsburgは35歳，母Gertrud Anna von Hohenbergは23歳であった。1273年10月24日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンストaテレジオン アーチェンアーチェンでLudwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rheinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年12月23日にドイツバイエルンムuンチェンで51歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス フuルステンフエルドブルックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg(이)가 1253년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 크레이스 o라치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rudolf I von Habsburg(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1273년 10월 24일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 스트a드테레조 아악헨 아악헨에서 Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 12월 23일 독일 베이른 u천에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 프u르스펠드브럭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg nasceu em 1253, em Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Rudolf I von Habsburg, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein em 24 de outubro de 1273, em Aachen, Städteregion Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1304, em München, Bayern, Alemanha, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg родилась в 1253 г. в местности крис лoррэич, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Rudolf I von Habsburg было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein 24 октября 1273 г. в местности аачэн, стaдтирегион аачэн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 декабря 1304 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности ландкрис фuрстенфелдбрукк, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde Gräfin von Habsburg nació en 1253, en Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Rudolf I von Habsburg, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ludwig II., der Strenge, Herzog von Oberbayern, Pfalzgraf bei Rhein el 24 de octubre de 1273, en Aachen, Städteregion Aachen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1304, en München, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Alemania.
